beer.beer_description: With aromas of coffee, dark chocolate and raisins, follow through to the full and rich palate, this is a seductive stout of silk creaminess and enveloping flavour. Think melted chocolate in lycra. Take a sip and savour its delectability.

items.badge_description: Congrats, you've unlocked the World Pint 2026: Australia badge! Keep checking in beers to score badges from the other 47 countries competing in the world's biggest football competition. Keep up to date on future badges by following us on social @untappd!

Looking for more kick than a session beer, but want to be able to stay for a few rounds? You have to keep it in the middle. That's 200 beers with an ABV greater than 5% and less than 10%. Try 5 more for Level 41!

Porters and Stouts are rich with both history and flavor. Roasty, dark, and delicious, these two styles helped start it all. That’s 35 different beers with the style of Porter or Stout. Try 5 more for Level 8!

items.badge_description: Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 80 distinct venues!

items.badge_description: Wouldn’t it be nice if milk stouts came directly from beer producing cows? While this unfortunately isn’t the case (yet) they do have a full body and sweetness due to a larger amount of lactose and sugars. That's 25 different beers with the style of Milk / Sweet Stout. Try 5 more for Level 6!

items.comment: This has to be one of the most interesting beers I’ve ever seen you drink 🍻

items.checkin_comment: It’s a stout. Bit maltier though, and creamier too

items.badge_description: Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 120 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 25.

items.checkin_comment: Decent stout. Not really milky to me however the profile is quite stoutish

items.badge_name: Beyond a Shadow of a Stout (Level 84)
items.badge_description: We all love Stouts, and now we have a dedicated badge to celebrate your dedication to these dark, top-fermented beer in multiple variations, like Oatmeal, Milk and more! Which one will you start with? That's 420 different beers with the style of Stout. Try 5 more for Level 85!

user.bio: Big ballsy hoppy west coast IPAs with bitterness that grabs your tongue and twists. Also trad ales & boozy Abbeys.

items.badge_description: Canning is all the rage and it's not hard to see why - travels well, more environmentally friendly, and no need to carry your bottle opener. That's 475 checkins with the serving style of Can. Try 5 more for Level 96! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast
